description:
You are a software architect documenting a microservices-based e-commerce platform in TiddlyWiki. Document the following six microservices as tiddlers tagged 'Microservice', including a one-sentence description in the body and the specified custom fields:

- UserService: team 'Platform', service-status 'production', depends-on (empty)
- ProductCatalog: team 'Commerce', service-status 'production', depends-on (empty)
- InventoryService: team 'Commerce', service-status 'production', depends-on 'ProductCatalog'
- PaymentGateway: team 'Platform', service-status 'production', depends-on 'UserService'
- OrderService: team 'Commerce', service-status 'production', depends-on 'UserService ProductCatalog InventoryService PaymentGateway'
- NotificationService: team 'Platform', service-status 'beta', depends-on 'UserService OrderService'

The 'depends-on' field should contain space-separated names of dependencies.

Additionally, create a dynamic 'Service Dependency Map' tiddler tagged 'Architecture'. This page must use TiddlyWiki widgets and filters to display:
- A dynamic list of all microservices
- The dependencies for each service
- The reverse dependencies for each service (which other services depend on it)
- A list of 'leaf services' (those with no dependencies)
- A summary count of the total number of microservices

All listings on the map page must be generated dynamically using filter expressions rather than hardcoded names.
